title: Validating Admission Policy — Failure Policy
text:
failurePolicy
defines how mis-configurations and CEL expressions evaluating to error from the
admission policy are handled. Allowed values are
Ignore
or
Fail
.
Ignore
means that an error calling the ValidatingAdmissionPolicy is ignored and the API
request is allowed to continue.
Fail
means that an error calling the ValidatingAdmissionPolicy causes the admission to fail
and the API request to be rejected.
Note that the
failurePolicy
is defined inside
ValidatingAdmissionPolicy
:
apiVersion
:
admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind
:
ValidatingAdmissionPolicy
spec
:
...
failurePolicy
:
Ignore
# The default is "Fail"
validations
:
-
expression
:
"object.spec.xyz == params.x"
